nodes.name: Geospatial Loss Functions
nodes.description: Loss primitives extracted from Overhead Geopose 2021 winner training code

nodes.name: r2_regression_loss
nodes.description: Scale-invariant regression loss computed as residual sum of squares divided by total sum of squares.
nodes.type_signature: (predictions: NDArray[np.float64], targets: NDArray[np.float64], target_mean: float | None = None) -> float

nodes.name: circular_direction_loss
nodes.description: Circular mean angular error between predicted orientation vectors and target angles using atan2(sin, cos).
nodes.type_signature: (pred_sin: NDArray[np.float64], pred_cos: NDArray[np.float64], target_angle: NDArray[np.float64]) -> float

nodes.name: geopose_citywise_r2_training_objective
nodes.description: Conceptual training objective where the R2 loss is injected into the AGL and MAG city-wise training calculators.
